entry.title: [BHS][Infrastructure] - Electrical Maintenance Notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 18, 16:30 - 22:30 UTC

May 5, 15:17 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Electrical Infrastructure in BHS.

Start time : 18/06/2026 16:30 UTC
End time : 18/06/2026 22:30 UTC
Service impact : None
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing an electrical maintenance in DC.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [SBG5][Infrastructure] - Rack SBG0504A06C Electrical Maintenance Notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 27, 06:00 - 15:00 UTC

May 5, 13:08 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Electrical Infrastructure in rack SBG0504A06C.

Start time : 27/05/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 27/05/2026 15:00 UTC
Service impact : During this maintenance, the servers in the affected rack will be gracefully shut down beforehand. Customers hosted on these servers should expect a planned service interruption for the duration of the maintenance window.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing an electrical maintenance in rack SBG0504A06C.

entry.title: [LIM1][Cooling System] - Rack L115A03 maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 26, 07:00 - 09:00 UTC

Apr 30, 22:08 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Start time : 26/05/2026 07:00 UTC
End time : 26/05/2026 09:00 UTC
Service impact : During this maintenance, the servers in the affected rack will be gracefully shut down beforehand. Customers hosted on these servers should expect a planned service interruption for the duration of the maintenance window.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [YNM1][Infrastructure] - Rack YNM0102G06C maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 21, 04:30 - 12:30 UTC

Apr 24, 12:34 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Start time : 21/05/2026 04:30 UTC
End time : 21/05/2026 12:30 UTC
Service impact : Customers could still experience a temporary reboot or shutdown in the worst case of their servers.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [WAW1][Cooling System] - Rack WAW0106A05B Maintenance Notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 20, 06:00 - 14:00 UTC

May 5, 12:55 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure in WAW0106A05B.

Start time : 20/05/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 20/05/2026 14:00 UTC

Service impact : During this maintenance, the cooling system's efficiency may be temporarily reduced for some servers, potentially lowering performance. Despite ongoing mitigation efforts, customers could still experience a temporary reboot or shutdown in the worst case.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [BHS][Infrastructure] - Electrical maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 12, 10:30 - 11:30 UTC

Apr 28, 21:26 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Infrastructure.

Start time : 12/05/2026 10:30 UTC
End time : 12/05/2026 11:30 UTC
Service impact : During the maintenance window, some servers in rooms B702 / B703 / B707 / B709 / B710 / B716 may be restarted. In such cases, a temporary unavailability of up to 30 minutes may be experienced.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing an electrical maintenance in BHS.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [ERI1][Infrastructure] - Network Maintenance Notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 11, 17:00 - 21:00 UTC

Apr 30, 16:01 UTC

Start time : 11/05/2026 17:00 UTC
End time : 11/05/2026 21:00 UTC
Service impact : During this maintenance, public and private networks might be temporarily unavailable for 20 minutes maximum.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [GLOBAL][Infrastructure] - Backbone maintenance notification
entry.content:
May 6, 19:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Apr 23, 14:08 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, a maintenance is scheduled on our backbone infrastructure.

Start time : 06/05/2026 19:00 UTC
End time : 07/05/2026 03:00 UTC
Service impact : Customers may experience increased latency and a loss of resiliency during the maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, our teams will be doing a maintenance on our network equipment.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [SBG5][Cooling System] - Rack SBG0502A05A maintenance notification
entry.content:
May 6, 15:17 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

May 6, 07:06 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 6, 07:04 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure in the rack SBG0502A05A.

Start time : 06/05/2026 06:58 UTC
End time : 06/05/2026 15:00 UTC
Service impact : The cooling system's efficiency could be temporarily impacted for some servers, which could cause a decreased performance during this maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.
